title: Senior Doctor - Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd!
